text: Expand the restaurant outreach research GLOBALLY (English-speaking markets first, no translation needed): find 12 more small INDEPENDENT restaurants/cafes across a MIX of cities — e.g. Brooklyn, LA, Austin, Chicago, London, Toronto, Dublin, Melbourne/Sydney — that PUBLISH a real contact email on their own website (verified, not a contact form). For each: name, city, the published email, a one-line personalized hook. APPEND them to tasks/T-029/restaurants.md (keep the existing table, add a new section 'Global batch 2'). Only include verified published emails. Then: git add -A && git -c user.name=Karen -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m '[Karen] T-029 global batch 2 (English-speaking)' && (git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)); then bin/warroom-say '[Karen] done: T-029 global batch 2'.
